DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF ALFREDO BUSTAMANTE'S MOTION TO LIFT STAY ON DISCOVERY IS DENIED. THE DECEMBER 20, 2010 STAY ORDER DIRECTED THAT DISCOVERY IN THIS MATTER "SHALL BE STAYED PENDING FINAL RESOLUTION OF THE CRIMINAL PROCEEDINGS AGAINST THE DEFENDANT THAT ARE PRESENTLY UNDERWAY." WHILE THE CRIMINAL TRIAL AGAINST THE DEFENDANT HAS COMPLETED, THE APPEAL OF THE DEFENDANT'S RESULTING CONVICTION IS STILL PENDING AND THUS HAS NOT BEEN FINALLY RESOLVED. (PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE PRO TEM: KATHERINE HUIBONHOA; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; NOT REPORTED

Mtn To Lift Stay On Disco
Off Calendar Sep-05-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Conor M. Kelly, Esq. of Walkup, Melodia, Kelly & Schoenberger, Tel. 415.981.7210, for plaintiff and moving party;
Nathan L. Winegar, Esq. of Coddington, Hicks & Danforth, Tel. 650.592.5400, for defendant and opposing party via court call.

RULING: The court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF ALFREDO BUSTAMANTE'S Motion To Lift Stay On Discovery is Denied. The December 20, 2010 Stay Order directed that discovery in this matter "shall be stayed pending final resolution of the criminal proceedings against the defendant that are presently underway." While the criminal trial against the defendant has completed, the appeal of the defendant's resulting conviction is still pending and thus has not been finally resolved. (Prevailing party to submit a form of order.) Judge Pro Tem: Katherine Huibonhoa; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
